title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Cavendish, Colosseum Fighters, Luffy, Zoro, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #2 as the first Colosseum fighters clash while Luffy tries to hide his identity and new rivals like Cavendish, Burgess, and Bartolomeo stand out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WELL... IT DOESN'T REALLY MATTER WHAT YOU DO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I've come this far without a devil fruit

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Because I will be taking the Mera Mera no mi

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes, it really is suitable for me... such a beautiful power.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: and without exerting too much effort

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're over the limit

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Just my own genius.

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: captain of the "beautiful pirate crew: Caudendiah of the 4W/hite 'Horae bounty: 280 million berries

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: COME HERE!!! Don't walk away when I'm talking to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So that's why everyone is practically naked

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Even that bronze statue

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: This is a show!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: The audience is looking to see blood

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: The ring is where the true nature of humans is brought to light

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Who wants to see a match prolonged by swords and armor?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Gladiators are showmen. It is the blood of the fallen ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: THAT EXCITES THE CROWD...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I saw you earlier, when you flipped that large man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Who are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'M LUFFY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The man who'll be king of the pirates

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Ehh!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You mean Lucy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: DONK

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh yeah, I'm Lucy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You just said your own name wrong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: For a second I thought Strawhat Luffy was here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah well that couldn't be right. The real one is supposed tobe an 8 meter tall giant

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...fu Fu... if you were really strawhat luffy ....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'd kill you right here and now

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I entered the new world three years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: and as a "Beautiful rookie" with a bounty over 200 million ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I stirred the hearts of the world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: day after day, my wanted posters that appeared in newspapers

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: would be stolen by girls everywhere, as if they were the pictures of a famous star...

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: I'm the nobleman pirate, "Cavendish of the White Horse"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: "Hey, you big star!!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: "Hmm? You mean me?" "Of course� "Fufufu...»

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And then what, one year later!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: News of Whitebeard's "Paramount War" Drowned out everything else....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And the little cookies who sprang out after me ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: With their "worst generation" name to accompany them....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Kept showing up and making such a scene!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The reporters no longer cared at all for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And that's why I'd kill him! Him, and all those cookies who stole my spotlight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shouldn't you really be thanking them...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The Mera Mera No mi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: IT SHALL BE MINE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: AND WHEN IT IS...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Maybe you'll stop ignoring me too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're good to go.

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
